summary: CDC Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) prevalence data from 2011 to present, combining landline and cell phone survey data on modifiable risk factors for chronic disease, including question, response, breakout category, topic, and geolocation.
CDC BRFSS historical survey questions from 1984-2023, including question text, variable name, topic, year, response options, and display order.
Provisional CDC death counts for COVID-19 (no longer updated), showing weekly deaths from COVID-19, pneumonia, influenza, and all causes by state, with percent of expected deaths.
American Rescue Plan (ARP) rural healthcare payments via HRSA to providers serving rural patients, showing provider name, payment amount, city, state, and ZIP code.
CDC Alzheimer's Disease and Healthy Aging data from BRFSS 2015-2022, covering cognitive health, vaccines, alcohol, aging, falls, and caregiver indicators by stratification and geolocation.
NCHS quarterly provisional death rate estimates for 15 leading causes of death plus drug overdose, falls (65+), and homicide by state from 2020 onward.
CDC STATE System e-cigarette youth access legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, citations, and measure descriptions by state and year.
CDC Household Pulse Survey indicators of anxiety and depression based on reported symptom frequency in the last 7 days, by indicator, group, subgroup, phase, and time period.

CDC PRAMS (Pregnancy Risk Assessment Monitoring System) state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2011, including prenatal care, Medicaid, breastfeeding, alcohol use, and abuse by breakout category.
CDC tax burden on tobacco data from 1970-2019, showing cigarette sales, average cost per pack, and tax burden measures by state and year.
NCHS US mortality trends since 1900 showing age-adjusted death rates and life expectancy at birth by race and sex and year.

CDC BRFSS SMART Metropolitan Statistical Area (MMSA) prevalence data from 2011 to present combining landline and cell phone data on behavioral risk factors by question, breakout category, topic, and geolocation.
NCHS pneumonia and influenza (P&I) deaths and all deaths by state and region, showing percent of deaths due to P&I, season, and percent complete.
CDC STATE System tobacco smokefree campus legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, data type, measure descriptions, and geolocation by state.
CDC 500 Cities 2019 release census tract-level health data, showing crude prevalence estimates for dental visits, cancer, cholesterol, diabetes, and other health outcomes at the census tract level.
CDC SAMMEC smoking-attributable expenditures (SAEs) data from 2005-2009, showing excess healthcare expenditures attributable to cigarette smoking by type, measure, and location.
CDC Question Inventory on Tobacco (QIT) compiling 7,000+ historical survey questions on tobacco use from 1965-2017, including question text, survey name, year, and response options.

CDC National Oral Health Surveillance System (NOHSS) adult oral health indicators from BRFSS 2012-2020, showing tooth loss, dental care access, and other oral health measures by location and breakout category.
CDC Medicaid coverage of tobacco cessation treatments and barriers data from 2008-2024, showing managed care plan coverage, summary measures, and comprehensive coverage status by state.
CDC water fluoridation statistics from 2000-2018, showing percentage and number of people receiving fluoridated water from public water systems by state and year.

CDC DASH Global School-based Student Health Survey (GSHS) data from 2003-2015, covering youth health risk behaviors including topic, subtopic, short question text, data value, and stratification by country.
CDC BRFSS SMART county-level prevalence data from 2011-2012, combining landline and cell phone data on behavioral risk factors by question, topic, class, confidence limits, and response.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of viral hemorrhagic fevers (Sabia virus through Zika virus) and yellow fever by reporting area, with current week, cumulative 2022, and cumulative 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of animal and human rabies by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
NCHS US mortality trends since 1900 showing age-adjusted death rates for five major causes of death (heart disease, cancer, stroke, etc.) by cause and year.
NCHS 122 Cities Mortality Reporting System weekly death counts in 122 US cities for 2016, showing pneumonia and influenza deaths and all-cause deaths by age group and city.
CDC DASH Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance System (YRBSS) middle school dataset from 1991-2017, showing prevalence of six categories of health risk behaviors by topic, stratification, and question.
CDC STATE System tobacco smokefree indoor air legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, citations, comments, and geolocation by state.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of viral hemorrhagic fevers (Chapare, Crimean-Congo, and Ebola viruses) by reporting area, with current week, cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Vancomycin-intermediate and Vancomycin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus and Varicella morbidity by reporting area, with cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of viral hemorrhagic fevers (Lujo, Machupo, and Marburg viruses) by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC Household Pulse Survey mental health care utilization data in the last 4 weeks, showing value, confidence intervals, group, subgroup, phase, and time period.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Tetanus, Toxic Shock Syndrome, and Trichinellosis by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Tuberculosis and Tularemia by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of viral hemorrhagic fevers (Guanarito, Junin, and Lassa viruses) by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of confirmed and probable Vibriosis by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
NCHS US life expectancy at birth estimates from 2010-2015 by state and census tract, covering 65,662 census tracts with life expectancy, standard error, and life expectancy range.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2009, including Medicaid, breastfeeding, infant health, contraception, and alcohol use by breakout category and location.
CDC STATE System tobacco tax legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, effective dates, citations, data type, and geolocation by state.
CDC adult tobacco consumption data from 2000 to present, showing domestic and per capita consumption of cigarettes, cigars, smokeless tobacco, pipe tobacco, and roll-your-own tobacco by state.
CDC STATE System tobacco licensure legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, data type, measure descriptions, and geolocation by state.
CDC STATE System tobacco preemption legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, effective dates, citations, comments, and geolocation by state.
CDC BRFSS vision and eye health surveillance data from 2013-2022, showing visual function indicators, glasses/contact lens use, and eye health measures stratified by age, race/ethnicity, and sex.

CDC NNDSS 2017 infrequently reported notifiable diseases table, showing current week, cumulative 2017, 5-year weekly averages, and total cases reported for prior years for diseases with fewer than 1,000 annual cases.
CDC NHANES vision and eye health surveillance data from 1999-2008, showing visual acuity, blindness, glaucoma, and diabetes-related eye conditions stratified by age, race/ethnicity, and sex.
CDC STATE System e-cigarette smokefree indoor air legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, effective dates, citations, and geolocation by state.

CDC DASH Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance System high school dataset from 1991-2017 (excluding sexual identity), showing prevalence of health risk behaviors by topic, question code, stratification type, and location.
CDC NNDSS 2014 table of notifiable diseases including Giardiasis and Gonorrhea, showing current week, previous 52-week median and maximum, and cumulative 2013 and 2014 case counts.

CDC heart disease mortality data for US adults 35+ from 2018-2020 (3-year average), showing age-standardized rates by sex, race/ethnicity, state/territory, and county with spatially smoothed estimates.
CDC Global Tobacco Surveillance System (GTSS) Global Adult Tobacco Survey (GATS) data from 2008-2017, showing tobacco use indicators by country, sex, WHO region, and MPOWER policy category.
CDC SAMMEC smoking-attributable mortality (SAM) data from 2005-2009, showing deaths caused by cigarette smoking by disease category, measure, and location.
ASTDD state oral health program synopses from 2011-2022, showing indicators for workforce, policy, school-based sealant programs, and cleft lip/palate recording by state.
NCHS US childhood mortality rates since 1900, showing death rates per 100,000 by age group and year.

CDC 500 Cities 2019 release city-level health data, showing crude and age-adjusted prevalence estimates for dental visits, cancer, cholesterol, diabetes, smoking, and other health outcomes at the city level.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2002, including abuse, WIC participation, unintended pregnancy, tobacco use, stress, and smoke exposure by breakout category.
CDC DASH YRBSS high school dataset from 2015-2017 including sexual orientation, showing prevalence of health risk behaviors by topic, question code, sexual identity, grade, and sample size.
CDC NNDSS 2014 table of notifiable diseases including Invasive Pneumococcal Disease and Legionellosis, showing current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2013 and 2014 case counts.

CDC NNDSS 2014 infrequently reported notifiable diseases table, showing current week, cumulative 2014, 5-year weekly averages, and total cases reported for prior years for rare diseases including anthrax, botulism, and brucellosis.
CDC Healthy People 2020 tobacco use objectives, showing baseline values, target years, target-setting methodology, objective number, and details for leading health indicators.
NCHS 122 Cities Mortality Reporting System weekly death counts for 2015, showing pneumonia and influenza deaths and all-cause deaths by age group and city.
CDC Global Health Professions Student Survey (GHPSS) data from 2005-2011, showing tobacco use and cessation counseling indicators among health professional students by country, sex, and year.

CDC NNDSS 2016 infrequently reported notifiable diseases, showing current week, cumulative 2016, 5-year weekly averages, and total cases reported for diseases including diphtheria, Ebola, and Hansen disease.
CDC COVID-19 state, tribal, local, and territorial funding data showing award name, supplemental act, topical area, jurisdiction, sub-jurisdiction, county, and amount.
CDC BRFSS age-adjusted prevalence data from 2011 to present, combining landline and cell phone data on behavioral risk factors by breakout category, year, confidence limits, and geolocation.
CDC NNDSS 2014 table of notifiable diseases including Lyme disease, Malaria, and Meningococcal disease, showing current week, previous 52-week median and maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC STATE System e-cigarette licensure legislation data from 1995-2025, showing enacted and effective dates, comments, data type, measure descriptions, and geolocation by state.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of congenital syphilis and primary/secondary syphilis by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC Global Youth Tobacco Survey (GYTS) data from 1999-2018, showing tobacco use indicators among students aged 13-15 by country, WHO region, sex, survey site, and MPOWER category.
CDC NNDSS 2017 table of notifiable diseases including Chlamydia and Coccidioidomycosis, showing current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2016 and 2017 case counts.

CDC NHANES national cardiovascular disease surveillance data from 1999-2018, showing cardiovascular health indicators including blood pressure, hypertension, and CVD risk factors by year and location.

CDC BRFSS Vision Module data from 2005-2016, showing vision impairment, access to eye care, and related conditions (diabetes, stroke, heart disease, hypertension) by question, breakout category, and location.
CDC BRFSS SMART MMSA prevalence data from 2002-2010 (landline only), showing behavioral risk factor prevalence by question, class, breakout category, and location.

CDC heart disease mortality data for US adults 35+ from 2019-2021 (3-year average), showing age-standardized rates by sex, race/ethnicity, state/territory, and county with spatially smoothed estimates.
US Census annual resident population estimates by selected age groups and sex for the United States, including data source file, display order, and geolocation.
CDC NNDSS 2014 table of viral hepatitis (acute) types A, B, and C, showing current week, previous 52-week median and maximum, and cumulative 2013 and 2014 case counts.
CDC NAAG tobacco settlement payment data from 1999-2024, showing annual settlement payment amounts, topic, sub-measure, and notes by state.
CDC STATE System tobacco smokefree indoor air legislation summary data from 1995-2025, showing type of restriction, summary values, topic descriptions, and geolocation by state and year.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection, Salmonella Typhi infection, and Salmonellosis by reporting area, with current week, cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of SARS-associated coronavirus disease, STEC, and Shigellosis by reporting area, with current week, cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC STATE System e-cigarette tax legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, effective dates, comments, measure descriptions, and geolocation by state.
CDC STATE System e-cigarette smokefree campus legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, topic descriptions, measure descriptions, and geolocation by state.
HHS Unaccompanied Children Program data (no longer updated) showing children in HHS care and children discharged from HHS care by date.
CDC STATE System e-cigarette preemption legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, enacted dates, comments, and geolocation by state.

CDC NNDSS 2015 infrequently reported notifiable diseases table, showing current week, cumulative 2015, 5-year weekly averages, and total cases reported for diseases including anthrax, botulism, and viral hemorrhagic fever.
NCHS potentially excess deaths from five leading causes of death (heart disease, cancer, stroke, CLRD, unintentional injury) by state, locality, HHS region, age range, and year.
CDC Household Pulse Survey health insurance coverage indicators at time of interview, showing public, private, and uninsured rates by state, subgroup, group, confidence intervals, and time period.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Smallpox and Streptococcal toxic shock syndrome by reporting area, with current week, cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Pertussis, Plague, and Paralytic Poliomyelitis by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC STATE System tobacco youth access legislation data from 1995-2025, showing provision details, group descriptions, measure descriptions, and geolocation by state and year.
CDC NNDSS 2014 table of notifiable diseases including Cryptosporidiosis, Dengue Fever, and Dengue Hemorrhagic Fever, showing current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Mumps and Novel Influenza A virus infections by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Q fever (total, acute, and chronic) by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of nonparalytic Poliovirus infection and Psittacosis by reporting area, with cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2006, including sleep behavior, abuse, alcohol use, breastfeeding, obesity, and contraception by breakout category.
CDC STATE System tobacco preemption legislation summary data from 1995-2025, showing preemption and licensure status, topic type, and geolocation by state and quarter.
CDC NNDSS 2017 table of notifiable diseases including Meningococcal disease and Pertussis with Mumps, showing current week, previous 52-week median and maximum, and cumulative 2016 and 2017 counts.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2010, including tobacco use, abuse, infant health, Medicaid, mental health, and morbidity by breakout category.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Meningococcal disease by other serogroups and unknown serogroup, by reporting area with current week, cumulative 2022 and 2021 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2022 provisional cases of Rubella and congenital Rubella syndrome by reporting area, with current week, previous 52-week maximum, and cumulative 2022 counts.
CDC NNDSS 2017 table of notifiable diseases including Legionellosis and Malaria, showing current week, previous 52-week median and maximum, and cumulative 2016 and 2017 case counts.
